research_questions: What is the background and motivation of threat actor {actor_name}?
What ATT&CK techniques does {actor_name} commonly use?
What malware families are associated with {actor_name}?
What are the known IOCs (IPs, domains, hashes) linked to {actor_name}?
rationale: Threat actor profiling requires ATT&CK group data and cross-referencing with KEV for recent exploits
